## Requirements Checklist
- [ ] **Observability** – OpenTelemetry tracing and metrics integrated
- [ ] **HTTP Server** – REST API exposed via FastAPI or equivalent
- [ ] **Load Generation** – Representative workload testing implemented (e.g., Locust)
- [ ] **Documentation** – README with setup and usage instructions
- [ ] **Containerization (optional)** – Dockerfile(s) provided for deployment
